Findings.Title: Group nesting expands to 412 effective members
Findings.Detail: Transitive expansion of group g-platform-admins reveals 412 effective principals.
Findings.Remediation: Flatten group nesting and audit membership.

Findings.Title: Service principal inherits Owner via group nesting
Findings.Detail: SPN inherits Owner via 3-level group nesting on rg-prod.
Findings.Remediation: Replace inherited Owner with scoped role.

Findings.Title: User has no transitive privileged role
Findings.Detail: Graph expansion confirms no privileged role inherited.
